title: Smoked Australian Lamb Skewers
description: A flavorful and tender lamb dish, marinated in a blend of herbs and spices, then grilled to perfection.

ingredients.name: Australian lamb shoulder, cut into 1-inch cubes

instructions: In a bowl, whisk together olive oil, Worcestershire sauce, lemon juice, garlic, and rosemary.
Add the lamb cubes to the marinade and mix to coat.
Thread the lamb cubes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Season the lamb with salt and pepper.
Brush the grill with olive oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the lamb reaches 145°F (63°C) for medium-rare.
Let the lamb rest for 5 minutes before serving.
